message:
fix(fcp-raptorq): start repair ESI at K', remove asupersync dependency, harden chunk and config

SystematicEncoder: repair ESI cursor now starts at K' (smallest
K' >= K from the systematic index table) instead of K.  ESIs in
[K, K') are virtual padding and must not be emitted as repair
symbols.  All doc comments, assertions, and tests updated to
reflect K' semantics.

decoder.rs: Fix potential u32 overflow in repair_count calculation
by widening to u64 before multiplication.

config.rs: source_symbols() now uses u32::try_from().unwrap_or(u32::MAX)
instead of bare cast for payload_len division.

chunk.rs: Add assert!(chunk_size > 0) panic guard on from_payload().

Cargo.toml: Remove direct asupersync path dependency — raptorq
crate no longer needs it directly.

golden.rs: Minor formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,6 @@ authors.workspace = true
 workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
-asupersync = { path = "/dp/asupersync", default-features = false }
 bytes.workspace = true
 blake3.workspace = true
 parking_lot.workspace = true
